title: Update module github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2 to v2.31.0
body:

| [github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo) | `v2.29.0` → `v2.31.0` | ![age](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/age/go/github.com%2fonsi%2fginkgo%2fv2/v2.31.0?slim=true) | ![confidence](https://developer.mend.io/api/mc/badges/confidence/go/github.com%2fonsi%2fginkgo%2fv2/v2.29.0/v2.31.0?slim=true) |

---

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>onsi/ginkgo (github.com/onsi/ginkgo/v2)</summary>

### [`v2.31.0`](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases/tag/v2.31.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.30.0...v2.31.0)

#### 2.31.0

Add a bunch of Claude Skills via the marketplace:

```
/plugin marketplace add onsi/ginkgo
/plugin install ginkgo@ginkgo
```

### [`v2.30.0`](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/releases/tag/v2.30.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/compare/v2.29.0...v2.30.0)

#### 2.30.0

##### Features

Ginkgo now allows `extentions/global.Reset` to support running multiple suites from within a single process.  This may take some massaging on your part (see [1672](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/issues/1672)) but can dramatically speed up codebases with O(hundreds) of test suites.

Thanks [@​lawrencejones](https://redirect.github.com/lawrencejones) !

##### Fixes

- Fix nested --github-output group for progress report nested inside timeline \[[`4f62d7a`](https://redirect.github.com/onsi/ginkgo/commit/4f62d7a)]

</details>
